title: Computer Scientists Begone
description: Removes Advanced Peripheral Computer Scientists and Computer Houses
body:
# Computer Scientists Begone

Very Simple mod that just force deletes all Computer Scientist Trades from Advanced Peripherals including their Structures

# Why do you want this?

In some modpacks Computers are supposed to be very high quality items and not easily obtainable with 2 Emeralds, which is why you dont want the Computer Scientists trading Computers.

# Theres still Computer Scientists!!

Due to some technical stuff with Advanced Peripherals registering its Villagers instantly, im not actually able to delete the Computer Scientists from the Game. I can basically only turn them into Nitwits sadly. If you do know of a way to achieve this, please do let me know!
